group-2: Red and blue light group-indicates working status
group-3: Combined light group (red, blue, green, blue, green light*2) - indicates the 4G signal strength
group-3-a10: Tricolor light group - indicates 4G signal strength
group-4: Green light group - indicates TF card indicator
options-2-1-desc: There is communication between the main control and the 4G module, but the signal is too poor to connect to the network.
options-2-10-desc: There is communication between the main control and the 4G module, but the SIM card is not recognized.
options-2-10-label: Red and blue lights flash alternately (frequency is 1 second)
options-2-11-desc: There is communication between the main control and the 4G module, and it is recognized that the SIM card is in arrears or is out of service.
options-2-11-label: Red and blue lights flash slowly alternately (frequency is 4 seconds)
options-2-12-label: Alternate flashing in sequence (frequency is 1 second)
options-2-13-label: Blue light flashes slowly (frequency is 4 seconds)
options-2-2-label: Red light flashes quickly (frequency is 0.2 seconds)
options-2-3-desc: There is no communication between the main control and the 4G module
options-2-3-label: Red light flashes slowly (frequency is 2 seconds)
options-2-4-desc: Equipment online, can connect to the server
options-2-5-desc: Successfully accessed the network, but could not connect to the keepalive server.
options-2-5-label: Blue light flashes quickly (frequency is 0.5 seconds)
options-2-6-label: Blue light flashes slowly (frequency is 2 seconds)
options-2-7-label: Red and blue lights always on
options-2-8-desc: Successfully connected to the network, connecting to the server
options-2-8-label: Red and blue lights flash quickly at the same time (frequency is 0.2 seconds)
options-2-9-desc: There is communication between the main control and the 4G module, but there is no APN that can access the network.
options-2-9-label: Red and blue lights flash slowly at the same time (frequency is 2 seconds)
options-3-2-label: 2 sets of blue lights are always on
options-3-2-label-a10: The blue light is always on
options-3-3-label: 3 sets of green lights are always on
options-3-3-label-a10: The green light is always on
options-4-1-label: The green light is always on
position-1-desc: Red light group - indicates charging status
position-2-desc: Red and blue light group-indicates working status
position-3-desc: Combined light group (red, blue, green, blue, green light*2) - indicates the 4G signal strength
position-3-desc-a10: Tricolor light group - indicates 4G signal strength
position-green-ll-desc: Green light group - indicates TF card indicator
